Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.http.HttpResource

Packages that use HttpResource
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.http.resource
Next-generation HTTP resource types — bodies bundled with associated headers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
Convention-endpoints mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the "internet conventions" surface (favicon, robots, sitemap, version, well-known) every public-facing service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops
Ops / introspection mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the operational surface (request echo, JVM admin, route index) every long-running Juneau service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile
REST Static Files Support

  • Uses of HttpResource in org.apache.juneau.http.resource

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.http.resource that implement HttpResource
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    HttpResourceBean
    Default immutable implementation of HttpResource: an HttpBody bundled with a set of associated headers (such as Content-Type, Content-Disposition, or Content-Language).

  • Uses of HttpResource in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention that return HttpResource
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpResource
    FaviconMixin.getFavicon()
    [GET /favicon.ico] — serve the configured favicon bytes.
    HttpResource
    FaviconResource.getFavicon()
    [GET /*] — serve the configured favicon bytes.
    HttpResource
    FaviconServlet.getFavicon()
    [GET /*] — serve the configured favicon bytes.
    HttpResource
    FaviconProvider.serve()
    Serves the configured favicon bytes.

  • Uses of HttpResource in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops that return HttpResource
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpResource
    HtdocMixin.getHtdoc(RestRequest req, String path, Locale locale)
    [GET /htdocs/*] - Retrieve static file.

  • Uses of HttpResource in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile that return HttpResource
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpResource
    StaticFilesMixin.getStaticFile(RestRequest req, String path, Locale locale)
    [GET /static/*] — serve a static file from the active StaticFiles bean.
    HttpResource
    StaticFilesResource.getStaticFile(RestRequest req, String path, Locale locale)
    [GET /*] — serve a static file from the active StaticFiles worker bean.
    HttpResource
    StaticFilesServlet.getStaticFile(RestRequest req, String path, Locale locale)
    [GET /*] — serve a static file from the active StaticFiles worker bean.
    HttpResource
    StaticFilesMixin.headStaticFile(RestRequest req, String path, Locale locale)
    [HEAD /static/*] — return GET headers for a static file without the body.
    HttpResource
    StaticFilesResource.headStaticFile(RestRequest req, String path, Locale locale)
    [HEAD /*] — return GET headers for a static file without the body.
    HttpResource
    StaticFilesServlet.headStaticFile(RestRequest req, String path, Locale locale)
    [HEAD /*] — return GET headers for a static file without the body.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile that return types with arguments of type HttpResource
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<HttpResource>
    BasicStaticFiles.resolve(String path, Locale locale)
    Resolve the specified path.
    Optional<HttpResource>
    StaticFiles.resolve(String path, Locale locale)
    Resolve the specified path.
